name: Cranberry Party Mold
recipeIngredient: 1 ½ cups Unsweetened canned crushed pineapple, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare gelatin according to package directions.
2. Add yogurt and stir until blended. Chill until slightly thickened.
3. Place cranberries and sweetener in a blender container. Blend until berries are chopped.
4. Add the chopped cranberries and remaining ingredients to the thickened gelatin.
5. Spoon into a large bowl and chill until firm. (If making this salad in a mold, use 1/2 cup less water than the directions call for).
6. Note: Use non-fat plain yogurt to reduce fat grams.
